forbidden_actions.pattern: Define new MemoryProvider interface or MemoryEngine type
Fork, vendor, or deeply import mem0 source code into src/
forbidden_actions.reason: User directive 2026-05-02: stack on top, no codebase fusion

forbidden_actions.pattern: Implement natural language intent parsing in naia-memory
forbidden_actions.reason: naia-agent responsibility — naia-memory handles search logic only

forbidden_actions.pattern: Make abstention or response decisions in naia-memory
forbidden_actions.reason: Agent + LLM responsibility, not memory layer

forbidden_actions.pattern: Create 5-layer hybrid or mem0+naia codebase fusion
forbidden_actions.reason: User directive: mem0 is one adapter option, not architecture

forbidden_actions.pattern: Category-specific adaptive weights or per-category thresholds
forbidden_actions.reason: Anti-overfitting — production queries have unknown categories

forbidden_actions.pattern: Move ko-time-parser or temporal NL parsing into naia-memory
forbidden_actions.reason: Agent responsibility — plan §3.7 explicitly moves to naia-agent

forbidden_actions.pattern: Log raw PII content to stdout/stderr/files
Expose API key values in logs or error messages
forbidden_actions.reason: Security — env var names OK, values never

locked_decisions.summary: mem0 위에 stack on top — no code coupling
